items.label: Estimation mode
items.hint: The mode discriminator, resolved by the caller before starting this run: a single target workflow (WORKFLOW_RUN) or an epic-package breakdown (SDLC_EPIC_PACKAGE). Both modes converge on the same structural-summary shape below, so downstream routing does not depend on it — it is recorded for disclosure only.

items.label: Structural summary (JSON)
items.hint: The deterministic structural analysis of the work being estimated, serialized as JSON.

items.label: No-ceiling reason
items.hint: Populated only when a finite execution ceiling could not be derived.
